content.json:
# PRODAFT USTA — Payment Card Fraud Intelligence

Monitors compromised payment cards ingested from the PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence API. The full card number is never stored — only the BIN (first 6), the last 4 digits, the brand, and the length are retained at ingestion.

Time filtering uses **Created** (the event time reported by USTA) so historical backfilled tickets appear on the correct date.

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created {TimeRange}
| summarize Cards = count() by bin(Created, 1d)
| sort by Created asc
content.title: Exposed payment cards over time

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created {TimeRange}
| extend State = iff(ExpirationDate > now(), "Valid", "Expired")
| summarize Count = count() by State
content.title: Valid vs expired

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created {TimeRange}
| summarize Cards = count() by CompanyName
| top 10 by Cards desc
content.title: Top affected companies

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(CardBrand)
| summarize Cards = count() by CardBrand
| sort by Cards desc
content.title: Exposed cards by brand

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(Status)
| summarize Cards = count() by Status
content.title: Cards by ticket status

content.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created {TimeRange}
| project Created, CompanyName, CardBrand, CardMasked, CardLength, ExpirationDate, Status
| sort by Created desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent payment card tickets
